'''Cobalt Station''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] fortification on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] during the [[Battle of Jabiim]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was located just north of [[Monsoon Mesa]].

During this battle, Commander [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] brought much-needed convoy of materials and reinforcements to this base. It is known that this convoy was later led into a minefield and the Republic forces suffered heavy losses.

{{Loc-stub}}
